ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "alpha_2_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code */,
  "alpha_3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "numeric_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code assigned to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "land_area" TEXT /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "iso_currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sanitation_types" (
  "sanitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sanitation type */,
  "sanitation_type" TEXT /* Description of the sanitation type (e.g., Flush toilet, Pit latrine) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sanitation type */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Sanitation standard the type adheres to */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sanitation facility is shared by multiple households */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sanitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sanitation_types_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES sanitation_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context */,
  "context_description" TEXT /* Description of the context (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the context area */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area covered by the context in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_description" TEXT /* Description of the sanitation classification */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Sanitation standard the classification adheres to */,
  "is_meets_basic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the classification meets basic sanitation criteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES sanitation_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country related to the data */,
  "sanitation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sanitation type */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the context (urban/rural) */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the classification of the sanitation facility */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of population with access to the sanitation type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey name) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the survey */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the survey */,
  "demographic_group" TEXT /* Demographic group (e.g., age, gender) for data disaggregation */,
  "service_level" TEXT /* Service level of the sanitation facility (e.g., basic, limited, unsafe) */,
  "improved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sanitation facility is improved */,
  "shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sanitation facility is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_sanitation_id FOREIGN KEY ("sanitation_id") REFERENCES sanitation_types ("sanitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., MICS, DHS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sanitation_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sanitation standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the sanitation standard */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Last reviewed timestamp of the standard */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who last reviewed the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Summary of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
